finding_results.notes: Revised both major conversations to separate idiolects and break composed register. DEMETRIUS: replaced epigrammatic thesis-lines ('Be careful in private. In public, be clear.' / 'People don't need your soul') with managerial, logistical speech ('Then be careful where nobody can see it' / 'Those are errands, Damian'). Added micro-breaks ('the actual —', 'before you've even —') and conversational markers ('Look'). GROSZ: replaced crisp wisdom lines ('A useful name, not a neat one' / 'I think I live alone' / aphoristic instructions) with stop-start disclosure ('His name kept — I kept hearing it' / 'I stopped — enough' / 'I'm still — I suppose I'm still'), explicit hedging ('I'm calling it what I think, not what I can prove'), personal fear ('I'm seventy-three and I live alone in a building with one stairwell'), and halting qualifiers throughout. DAMIAN: added self-interruptions when approaching too-honest statements ('I'm not — look' at line 139; 'This is —' stopped and restarted at line 273). NARRATOR: removed 'The line landed between them and stayed there' (line 137); replaced 'It landed on Damian' with 'There it was' (line 369). Contraction fixes applied to Grosz ('would not' → 'wouldn't', 'whether' → 'if'). Each conversation now contains multiple visibly messy spoken turns (interruptions, restarts, qualifications). No line is framed by narrator admiration.

summary: Rebuilt dialogue register across both major conversations (Demetrius lunch, Grosz visit) to fix collapsed idiolect separation and composed-speech defaults. Demetrius now sounds managerial and infrastructural — talks about errands, logistics, and who-does-what rather than producing balanced thesis-lines. Grosz now sounds partial, older, frightened, and hedging — stop-start disclosure with explicit self-qualification rather than crisp wisdom. Damian gains visible overcontrol with self-interruption at moments of unwanted honesty. Removed all narrator admiration of dialogue ('landed'). Both conversations now contain multiple messy spoken turns (restarts, aborted sentences, qualifiers). The three voices should be distinguishable by register alone: Damian's diplomatic overcontrol, Demetrius's blunt managerial impatience, Grosz's cautious stop-start fear.
